text: Romans 5 1 through 8. The Bible declares that God is love in 1 John 4.8. But there are so many false ideas that are circulated about the love of God today. Divine love is commonly portrayed as if it were like a human, emotion. The popular teaching is that God loves you and has a wonderful plan for your life. Supposedly, the loving heart of God longs to see all people saved, and we hear frequently for God so loved the world that he gave his only begotten son. We're told that God is saddened, even brokenhearted when sinners refused to come to Christ for salvation and are cast into hell. However, your thinking about God's love cannot be taken from human ideas, but it must be taken from the scriptures. And the scriptures give us something quite different about the love of God than the popular view. To know God's love's most wonderful thing in the world, if properly understood.
